# Naqvi Bukhari Saadat Genealogy Archive

This website contains historical genealogy records, lineage chains, migration history, and family documentation related to Naqvi Bukhari Sayyid families of Hyderabad Sindh, Karachi, Agra, Firozabad, Uch Sharif, and related lineages.

Primary topics:
- Ahl al-Bayt lineage
- Naqvi Sadat genealogy
- Bukhari Sayyid history
- Uch Sharif lineages
- Jalaluddin Surkh Posh Bukhari descendants
- Imam Ali al-Naqi lineage
- Hyderabad Sindh Sadat families
- Agra and Firozabad Sayyid migration history

Primary genealogy branch:
Syed Shahzaib Ali Naqvi → Syed Qadeer Ali Naqvi → Syed Umeed Ali → Syed Muhabbat Ali → Syed Nafees Ali → Syed Ashiq Ali → Syed Shakir Ali Shah → Syed Ameer Ali Shah

Website:
https://contactsadaatgeneology-lab.github.io/saadat-hyderabadi-firozabadi-agra-aaleameer-aalenafees-family-tree/
